subcodes.first_line: Thy letter reached this Wronged One in the Most Great Prison, and the sweet fragrances of thy love were inhaled therefrom. God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات در سجن اعظم باینمظلوم رسید نفحات محبت از او استشمام شد انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
